# sevalla_process_resource_types (Data Source)

Use this data source to list all available Sevalla process resource types.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sevalla_process_resource_types" "all" {}

output "resource_type_names" {
  value = [for rt in data.sevalla_process_resource_types.all.process_resource_types : rt.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `process_resource_types` (Attributes List) The list of available process resource types. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--process_resource_types))

<a id="nestedatt--process_resource_types"></a>
### Nested Schema for `process_resource_types`

Read-Only:

- `category` (String) The category of the process resource type.
- `cpu_limit` (Number) The CPU limit in millicores.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the process resource type.
- `memory_limit` (Number) The memory limit in bytes.
- `name` (String) The name of the process resource type.
